original text:
in, to, 等介词连用;其前也不用冠词.
通常只作及物动词,通常用于 admire (sb for) sth, all admire your taste art. 我们都钦佩你的艺术鉴赏力. admired his immense physical
although 后连用 but.如: 虽然天很冷,但我们还是去了那儿. 正:Although was cold, went there. 误:Although was cold, but went there.
◎他决定放弃这个计划. 误:He decided abandon the plan. 正:He decided abandon the plan. 析:动词 连用.比较:give the plan(放弃计划).
误:The police accused him for theft [stealing]. 正:The police accused him theft [stealing]. accused (doing) sth 这样的结构,注意不要将其中的介词 改为for,又如:He was accused breaking the law.( 他被指 控违法).
误:We don't allow smoke here. 正:We don't allow smoking here.
析:almost 情态动词, 词等, 则可置于其后).以上误句由于 almost worked 其意为差不多工作了(但实际上未工作), 不合原意.
析:have alternative but sth 意为除了做某事外没 有其它的办法,but 后通常接带 不定式.比较:There was alternative but leave. (没有别的办法,只好离 开).
the, this, that, my, your 等连用.如: You are the very man want see. 你正是我想要见的人. that very moment the phone rang. 就在那时电话铃响了.
析:suspect(猜想, 名词＋不定式(通常为 be),且该结构通常可以用从句 来改写,如上面的误句也可说成:I suspect that the pickpocket. 注:以上结构中的不定式通常是 be,若用其 suspect him have said so.(我们猜他是那样说过),I suspect him dying.(我看他快要死了).
正:The baby asleep. 这婴儿是睡着的. 误:Look the asleep baby. 正:Look the sleeping baby. 瞧这个睡觉的婴儿. [注]asleep
maybe 你也许是对的.
for, 连用.如: Our school convenient for [to] the station. 我们学校离车站很近便.
open the door answer the the opened the door and went out. 他打开门就出去了. Will you answer the door? There's someone knocking. 请你去开门,有人在敲门.
析:content contents
汉语说棉衣是 cotton clothes 吗?否! cotton clothes iscomfortable wear cotton clothes. 穿布衣舒服.
come here(来这儿),come school(来上学),go there(去那儿),go school(去上学).
◆这个村庄很容易到达. 误:The village easy accesses. 正:The village easy access. 词.又如:He easy access(他很容易接近).
◆在这次车祸中有五个人丧生. 误:Five people were killed the car incident. 正:Five people were killed the car accident. 析:incident 主要指普通的小事件, 也可指暴力性的政治事件;而 accident 则指偶然的不幸事件(即指事故).
◆他坚持要陪她去车站. 误:He insisted accompanying her the station. 正:He insisted accompanying her the station. 析:表示陪某人去某地,只说 accompany place即可,通 常不说 accompany sth.
◆他承认偷了钱. 误:He admitted have stolen the money. 正:He admitted having stolen the money.
◆他们决定采纳我们的建议. 误:They decided adopt our suggestion. 正:They decided adopt our suggestion.
析:用作介词, 与一段时间连用表示在...之后时, after 有区别:after 表示以过去时间为起点的一段时间以后, 常与过去时态连用;而 则表示以现在为起点的一段时间以 后:He came back after few minutes.(他几分种后就回来 了).

HENDERSON, (Mar. 18, 2019) Last Friday, Just Add Water Street (JAWS) returns downtown Henderson kick off its celebrated chef challenge event and exciting activations for all ages, Friday, Mar. 29. Attendees will enjoy street-side entertainment, food vendors, retail pop-ups, live music and more the historic Water Street District from 6-10 p.m.
Returning host this month's chef challenge event Season Hell's Kitchen Victor and Chef Scott Commings. Set the main stage the Henderson Pavilion, the chef challenge will consist two local chefs who will provided proteins furnished Mikuni Harvest. They'll then have create two plates less than minutes. The two competitors set head-to-head are Scott Pajak, former Food Network "Chopped" champion and chef cuisine Lagasse's Stadium Palazzo|Venetian, against notable chef Robert Lomeli Hecho Vegas the MGM Grand.
Local foodies and media personalities will bring the heat the judges' table this month's roster includes Samantha Thomas KTNV Channel Action News, award-winning journalist and talk show host. She will joined Bart Cops, also known "Camper Chef," recognized for his unique cooking techniques and recipes all done within the walls his vintage camper. And lastly, rounding out the judges' panel Bruce Sulzberg, 3-dimensional artist, videographer, producer and pop-up chef extraordinaire.
addition, Last Friday sponsoring the nonprofit, Serving Our Kids Foundation, with non-perishable food and water drive. This volunteer-driven organization dedicated feeding at-risk and homeless children throughout Clark County. has served more than 435,000 weekend food bags children and currently supports Clark County schools providing weekend food bags.
General admission the Last Friday, JAWS free the public. The community festival begins p.m., and the live chef challenge kicks off p.m. Last Friday was founded resurrect and celebrate the community's emerging arts footprint. Area sponsors include The City Henderson and few Henderson's community-driven partners such the Las Vegas Weekly, Findlay Las Vegas Volkswagen, Lotus Broadcasting, Station Casinos, Rod's Produce Market, and Mikuni Harvest. learn more about Serving Our Kids Foundation, visit learn more about the event, visit for more details.
Incorporated 1953, Henderson Nevada's second largest city with more than 302,000 residents. Henderson premier city, nationally recognized for its stunning parks, trails, master-planned communities, outstanding quality life and patriotic past. Recognized one America's Best Places Live (MONEY and Liveability.com), one America's Best Cities (Business Week), one the top six safest cities America (Forbes, Law Street Media, Movato.com), and Bicycle Friendly Community (League American Bicyclists), Henderson progressive and vibrant city committed maintaining premier amenities and services for all who choose live, learn, work and play Henderson... place call home.

original text:
Mac and Mac deduce that since fish live schools, they must smart. The fish this funny story are smart enough outwit Mac and Mac! Cousin Meatball also gets the better them. convinces the brothers that they put their snack into toy boat, the little boat will grow into big one. seems work. does it? Then three fish get the boys feed them worms while avoiding Mac's and Mac's fish hooks. well. Mac and Mac would rather snack fish crackers and gummy worms anyway! The stories this book are inspired traditional folktales referenced back matter.
Arnold, Tedd., Hamilton, Martha,, Hamilton, Martha., Weiss, Mitch, 1951-, Weiss, Mitch.
Best-selling TEDD ARNOLD has teamed with two professional storytellers create third comic-style book about the gullible Noodlehead Brothers, Mac and Mac. Mac and Mac deduce that since fish live schools, they must smart. The fish this funny story are smart enough outwit Mac and Mac! Cousin Meatball also gets the better them. convinces the brothers that they put their snack into toy boat, the little boat will grow into big one. seems work. does it? Then three fish get the boys feed them worms while avoiding Mac's and Mac's fish hooks. well. Mac and Mac would rather snack fish crackers and gummy worms anyway! The stories this book are inspired traditional folktales referenced back matter. Like comics? Like laugh? Then you'll love the wacky antics brothers Mac and Mac, brought you the guy who does Fly Guy and his two Noodlehead friends. These easy-to-read graphic novels feature short accessible chapters, perfect for young comic fans! Twin brothers Mac and Mac are upstairs!--but kids can use their own noodles see where the brothers' ideas wrong. Encouraging readers think for themselves, this Theodor Seuss Geisel Award-winning series has its roots world folklore and traditional tales fools. Junior Library Guild selection!
House,|2018.|48 p., Novel|Books|First House,||1 volume (unpaged) color illustrations cm, House,|2018.|48
